checks.finding: No issues found. tasks.md Requirements/Done-When fields reference only REQ-NNN and AC-NNN IDs that resolve to real entries in acceptance-tests.md (AC-001..AC-019, all present).

No issues found. All 11 tasks' Blockers fields are either 'None' (T-001) or comma-separated T-\d{3} lists (e.g. T-005: 'T-002, T-003, T-004'). No range notation or prose. Consistent with precheck-result.json blockers_format_valid: true. blockers_format_valid=true.
No issues found. All 13 REQ IDs (REQ-001..REQ-013) in requirements.md appear in at least one task's Requirements field (confirmed via grep over tasks.md, matching traceability.md Task→REQ table).

No issues found. All 19 AC IDs (AC-001..AC-019) in acceptance-tests.md appear in tasks.md Done When items and traceability.md AC→TEST→Task table, each mapped to exactly one task (T-002 through T-011).
No issues found. Every task (T-001..T-011) declares a non-empty Requirements field with at least one real REQ-NNN (e.g. T-001: REQ-001, REQ-004, REQ-013; T-011: REQ-012). No orphan tasks.
No issues found. T-006 ('read-only 静的検査 + no-write テスト') is the only task whose title contains a test-indicating term ('テスト'); its Done When cites AC-006 and AC-007 explicitly. No orphaned test task.
No issues found. All 11 tasks declare 'Approval: Draft' and 'Status: Planned', matching the attempt-1/round-1 requirement.

No issues found. All tasks declare Risk and Required Workflow, and every pairing matches the risk-gate matrix: medium->acceptance-first (T-001, T-005, T-007, T-008), high->tdd (T-002, T-003, T-004, T-006, T-009, T-010), low->test-after (T-011). Consistent with precheck-result.json workflow_match_precheck: PASS.

No issues found. Deduplicated per-task AC references show each AC-NNN (AC-001..AC-019) attributed to exactly one distinct task; repeated in-task occurrences (e.g. AC-001 appearing in T-005's Goal, Scope, and Done When) are the same task restating its own target, not cross-task duplication.
No issues found. Every task ID referenced in a Blockers field (T-001..T-010) exists in dependency-graph.json nodes array, which lists exactly T-001..T-011 matching tasks.md.

BLOCKERS-FORMAT is PASS, so this check ran. DFS over dependency-graph.json edges (22 edges, 11 nodes) found no revisited node on any path; graph is a DAG with T-011 as final sink depending on all others.

No issues found. Titles/scopes using '+' combine tightly coupled sub-parts of one concern (e.g. T-002 github-client + error-normalizer both implement the single GET-only upstream path per REQ-006; T-003 auth + scrubbing + no-secrets are one auth concern per REQ-005; T-006 static-check + no-write test are one write-boundary concern per REQ-003; T-008 dist + CI + smoke are one distribution-verification concern per REQ-009; T-011 docs + traceability finalization is mandatory housekeeping). No task joins two distinct feature concerns.

No issues found. Each task's Done When items cite concrete, inspectable criteria: specific AC-numbered behaviors (e.g. T-005 AC-001..AC-005 with exact field lists), named test evidence ('Red→Green evidence', 'independent review verdict PASS in evidence', 'typecheck / all tests green'), and named artifact paths (e.g. 'reports/implementation/ci-mcp-T-00N.md', 'contracts/ci-mcp-tools.v1.schema.json'). T-011 (documentation-only) names the exact files/sections (README.md/USERGUIDE.md content list per AC-019; traceability.md Status column) whose change proves completion. No forbidden vague verbs ('ensure', 'consider', 'works correctly', 'verify is correct') found in any Done When bullet.

No issues found. All task IDs T-001..T-011 in tasks.md have corresponding rows in traceability.md's Task->REQ and AC->TEST->Task tables (apparent 'T-012'..'T-019' regex matches are TEST-012..TEST-019 identifiers, not dangling task references, confirmed by direct inspection of those lines). All REQ IDs in traceability.md (REQ-001..REQ-013) exist in requirements.md. Each REQ row cites either a hash-bound layer anchor (e.g. security-spec.md#trust-boundaries, infra-spec.md#deployment-topology) or a reasoned 'N/A — cross-layer only:' value (REQ-002, REQ-004, REQ-008, REQ-012, REQ-013).
